series_metadata.series_description: File containing all in-house records of disability benefits claims which have been inactive for two years, claims for deceased employees, and medical information, where claim was not filed within two years.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for 2 years, then microfilm. Destroy paper copy after microfilm checked for quality and completeness. ; Microform: Retain microfilm until superseded by updated microfiche, then destroy superseded microfiche. Retain for 30 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
